why_it_matters: This 1.0.0 Android core release captures the production-ready Capacitor-first runtime, lifecycle, parity, and authenticated media improvements in the native artifact consumed by the Capacitor package.
user_impact: Android consumers benefit from the hardened playback, lifecycle, parity, and request-header behavior via the published native core artifact.
upgrade_notes: This release is intended to be consumed through @ddgutierrezc/legato-capacitor@1.0.0 rather than directly by most app developers.
breaking_changes: None intended for consumers on the final 0.1.x line; this is the formal 1.0.0 stabilization of the Android native core.
highlights: Production-ready Android runtime playback and lifecycle baseline.
Authenticated media request support for static per-track headers.
known_limitations: Process-death restore and broad OEM matrix hardening remain post-1.0 follow-up work.
